videos.headline: Central Arkansas Bears vs. Missouri Tigers: Full Highlights
videos.description: Central Arkansas Bears vs. Missouri Tigers: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Central Arkansas Bears vs. Missouri Tigers: Full Highlights) 2025/08/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: QB Beau Pribula powers Mizzou mauling of Bears
videos.description: In his dazzling debut as Missouri's starting quarterback, Beau Pribula throws for two touchdowns and runs for two in a 61-6 romp over Central Arkansas.

videos.headline: Beau Pribula's first pass at Mizzou is a 51-yard TD
videos.description: Beau Pribula's first pass at Missouri is a memorable one as he drops in a 51-yard touchdown to Marquis Johnson.

videos.headline: Drinkwitz praises Johnson, Pribula in Mizzou's win over UCA
videos.description: Acknowledging how much the injured Sam Horn means to Missouri, Eliah Drinkwitz praised Marquis Johnson and Beau Pribula for their standout season-opening performance.

videos.headline: Beau Pribula humble in reflection of his first Mizzou win
videos.description: Despite becoming Missouri's first player since 2018 with two passing and two rushing touchdowns in a game, Beau Pribula puts the spotlight on his teammates for their unwavering support.
